Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Packaging a Gleam app into a single executable 64 upvotes, 3 comments
  2. First in-utero stem cell therapy for fetal spina bifida repair is safe: study 199 upvotes, 23 comments
  3. LFortran Compiles Fpm 22 upvotes, 2 comments
  4. Inside the M4 Apple Neural Engine, Part 1: Reverse Engineering 204 upvotes, 54 comments
  5. "That Shape Had None" – A Horror of Substrate Independence (Short Fiction) 42 upvotes, 7 comments
  6. Motorola announces a partnership with GrapheneOS 1870 upvotes, 666 comments
  7. Microsoft bans the word "Microslop" on its Discord, then locks the server 941 upvotes, 408 comments
  8. Show HN: uBlock filter list to blur all Instagram Reels 48 upvotes, 14 comments
  9. Build your own Command Line with ANSI escape codes (2016) 18 upvotes, 3 comments
  10. Notes on Lagrange Interpolating Polynomials 34 upvotes, 9 comments
  11. Making Video Games in 2025 (without an engine) 381 upvotes, 180 comments
  12. British Columbia to end time changes, adopt year-round daylight time 66 upvotes, 25 comments
  13. Show HN: Pianoterm – Run shell commands from your Piano. A Linux CLI tool 6 upvotes, 0 comments
  14. 19th century silent film that first captured a robot attack 24 upvotes, 7 comments
  15. Use the Mikado Method to do safe changes in a complex codebase 124 upvotes, 64 comments
  16. Show HN: Govbase – Follow a bill from source text to news bias to social posts 106 upvotes, 54 comments
  17. Launch HN: OctaPulse (YC W26) – Robotics and computer vision for fish farming 47 upvotes, 23 comments
  18. Zclaw – The 888 KiB Assistant 63 upvotes, 34 comments
  19. Boss-CSS: I created another "CSS-in-JS" lib 4 upvotes, 0 comments
  20. Parallel coding agents with tmux and Markdown specs 84 upvotes, 59 comments
  21. iPhone 17e 117 upvotes, 94 comments
  22. Language Model Contains Personality Subnetworks 35 upvotes, 22 comments
  23. How to talk to anyone and why you should 484 upvotes, 484 comments
  24. Why Objective-C 99 upvotes, 91 comments
  25. OpenClaw surpasses React to become the most-starred software project on GitHub 227 upvotes, 258 comments
  26. Ask HN: Who is hiring? (March 2026) 126 upvotes, 165 comments
  27. New iPad Air, powered by M4 250 upvotes, 413 comments
  28. A case for Go as the best language for AI agents 100 upvotes, 151 comments
  29. Ask HN: Who wants to be hired? (March 2026) 36 upvotes, 111 comments
  30. Reflex (YC W23) Is Hiring Software Engineers – Python 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 5:30am, 3 March 2026. Source here.
